name: Free Video Cutter Joiner
short_description: The easiest free video cutter joiner software can cut large video file and remove unwanted parts like commercials, outtakes and trailers. Free Video Cutter Joiner works well with many file formats like AVI, MPEG, MP4, WMV, 3GP, FLV,etc.
detailed_description:
The easiest free video cutter joiner software can cut large video file and remove unwanted parts like commercials, outtakes and trailers. Free Video Cutter Joiner works well with many file formats like AVI, MPEG, MP4, WMV, 3GP, FLV,etc.
Key Features
Supporting any audio and video formats including AVI, MP4, FLV, WMV, MOV, VOB, 3GP etc
Video Cutter Joiner also can join serval video files into MP4,AVI,FLV, WMV, MOV, VOB, MPG format etc.
Video Cutter Joiner is comfortable video cutting software for lossless video cutting
Speed of cutting video is quite fast
